Hi, my name is Atharva Mahule. This is my portfolio where I showcase my skills, projects, and interests in technology and development.
I’m Atharva Mahule. This portfolio highlights my technical skills, projects, and passion for software development and AI.

patterns: What roles do you work in?
Are you into AI or ML?
responses: I’m passionate about technology and problem solving. I work as a web developer, an AI and machine learning enthusiast, and a competitive programmer.
My interests include web development, artificial intelligence and machine learning, and competitive programming.
I have worked on multiple projects, including a GPT-style chatbot trained on the Harry Potter book series and an audio event classification system using Google’s YAMNet model.
Some of my key projects include Harry’s Gibberish ChatBot, a transformer-based language model chatbot, and an audio classification system built using TensorFlow Hub’s YAMNet.

patterns: Tell me more about your chatbot project
What is the appointment management project?
responses: Harry’s Gibberish ChatBot is a custom GPT-style transformer language model trained on the complete Harry Potter book corpus. It uses character-level tokenization, multi-head self-attention, and autoregressive text generation, and is deployed through a simple web interface.
One of my projects uses Google’s pre-trained YAMNet model to classify real-world audio events. It processes audio signals, runs inference, and ranks sound classes based on confidence scores.

patterns: How do I connect with you?
responses: You can reach out to me through my LinkedIn profile, GitHub account, or email, which are available in the contact section of my portfolio.
I’m available on LinkedIn, GitHub, and email. You can find all contact links in the footer of my portfolio.
You can access my resume directly from the portfolio using the Resume button.
My resume is available on the portfolio page and can be accessed through the Resume option.
